nasb.text: You will have plenty to eat and be satisfied And praise the name of the Lord your God, Who has dealt wondrously with you; Then My people will never be put to shame.

esv.text: “You shall eat in plenty and be satisfied, and praise the name of the Lord your God, who has dealt wondrously with you. And my people shall never again be put to shame.

cnv.text: 你們必吃得豐富， 並且飽足， 你們就讚美耶和華你們的　神的名， 因為他為你們行了奇妙的事。 我的子民必永遠不會羞愧。

ccb.text: 你们必吃得饱足， 并赞美你们的上帝耶和华的名， 因祂为你们行了奇事。 我的子民永远不会再蒙羞。
